description: The quantity and spatial distribution of non-vertebrate animals living near (bentho-pelagic or hyperbenthic), on (epifauna), or beneath (infauna), the seafloor. Source: GOOS Essential Ocean Variable specification sheet, v1.0, April 2025. Vocabulary status and discussion — NERC EXV: https://github.com/nvs-vocabs/EXV/blob/main/README.md; ENVO minting: https://github.com/EnvironmentOntology/envo/pull/1568.
name: Benthic invertebrate abundance and distribution
